name: Phi-3-mini (3.8B)
note: First production-grade Phi; ~GPT-3.5-class quality at 3.8B, runs on-device, shipped in a 4K-context variant (this record) and a separate 128K-context sibling, both MIT-licensed.

results.notes: 5-shot, June 2024 updated checkpoint numbers on the current model card
AGI Eval, 5-shot, June 2024 updated checkpoint numbers

EU21-MMLU, Thellmann et al. 2024, Table 13 ('Phi-3-mini-4k-Instruct'). Matches this catalog entry's linked microsoft/Phi-3-mini-4k-instruct exactly (the paper also separately tested the 128k-context variant at 46.2, essentially identical).
MT-Bench, 2-round average (GPT-4 judge), Table 3 of the Phi-3 Technical Report. Not previously tracked for this model.

TruthfulQA MC2, 10-shot, Table 3 of the Phi-3 Technical Report (same 'June 2024 update' table already used for this model's other rows). [score corrected during round-6 completeness verify: proposed 65 -> 64.7] [score corrected during round-12 accuracy re-verify: 64.7 -> 65, per verifier: Directly read the Phi-3 Technical Report PDF (arXiv 2404.14219), p.6 benchmark table -- the cited sourceUrl. The 'TruthfulQA (10-Shot; MC2)' row for the Phi-3-mini (3.8b) column reads 65.0, not 64.7 (Phi-3-small=70.2, Phi-3-medium=75.1). The 64.7 fig]

Hugging Face Open LLM Leaderboard v2 official auto-eval run 'microsoft_Phi-3-mini-4k-instruct_bfloat16' (0-shot, strict prompt-level accuracy). Confirmed via the open-llm-leaderboard/contents dataset row (Official Providers: true).

Hugging Face Open LLM Leaderboard v2 official auto-eval run for microsoft/Phi-3-mini-4k-instruct (5-shot). Distinct from Microsoft's own self-reported MMLU number already on file. [score corrected during round-6 completeness verify: proposed 31.8 -> 40.2]

Hugging Face Open LLM Leaderboard v2 'MATH Lvl 5' slice (hardest tier only, 4-shot) of the Hendrycks MATH test set, not the full test set; official auto-eval run. Flagged as a partial-difficulty measurement of the same underlying benchmark since no separate tiered MATH slug exists in the taxonomy. [score corrected during round-6 completeness verify: proposed 11.6 -> 14.2]

verificationNotes: Existence, 3.8B params, MIT license, April 23 2024 Azure launch all confirmed. CORRECTED ctxK from 128 to 4: the record's own hf link names the '4k' variant (microsoft/Phi-3-mini-4k-instruct), and that model card / the original Phi-3 Technical Report confirm a native 4096-token context window (128K belongs to the separate sibling microsoft/Phi-3-mini-128k-instruct) — kept the record scoped to the 4k-instruct card per its own hf link. Fetched the live HF model card and confirmed all 5 benchmark rows verbatim (MMLU 70.9, HumanEval 57.3, GSM8K 85.7, BBH 73.5, GPQA 30.6); note these are the card's 'June 2024 Update' numbers superseding the original April 2024 launch table in the arXiv report (MMLU 68.8, GPQA 23.7) — both are legitimately Microsoft-reported for this same model, just at different checkpoints, and the record's numbers match the current/live card. Azure AI Foundry price ($0.13/$0.52 per 1M tokens) could not be independently reconfirmed on the current pricing page (fetch timed out) but no contradicting figure was found either; left as reported.
